{{CargoRelic
|name=Dimensional Wanted Order S-5
|class_id=20866
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles occupy space-time gaps, Earth's will issues this wanted order to encourage travelers to go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=15
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=29
|ss1=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +10<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +1<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss2=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +20<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +2<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss3=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss4=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss7=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail HP +30<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail ATK +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
